last_added.title: The EU agrees its 21st Russia sanctions package targeting banks — after Greece wins a year-long exemption to keep shipping Russian gas
A federal judge extends the freeze on Paramount's $111 billion Warner Bros. Discovery takeover to at least August 17
IndiGo's parent swings to a ₹238 crore loss last quarter — even as revenue jumped 20% — because jet fuel got so much more expensive
Parliament moves to permanently expand the Supreme Court from 33 to 37 judges, replacing a Modi government ordinance
